2606.17739.title: ED3R: Energy-Aware Distributed Disaster Detection Enabled by Cooperative Robotic Agents
2606.17739.paper_summary: Robotics are expected to support environmental monitoring and natural disaster management, where decisions must be made under uncertainty, resource limitations, and strict operational constraints. In critical missions, such as wildfires, robotic agents must not only identify hazardous events with sufficient confidence, but also manage the energy cost and time until detection. This paper introduces ED3R, an energy-aware distributed framework for wildfire detection under uncertainty. ED3R enables hierarchical cooperative decision-making between a robot and a remote controller. The remote controller decides upon the robot's motion, while the robot senses the environment and decides where to execute the wildfire detection (onboard or remotely) and how. The common goal is to detect wildfires with a required confidence while minimizing the energy consumed by any robot operation. ED3R further integrates mechanisms to avoid nearby obstacles, prevent redundant exploration, enable adaptive early mission completion, and ensure feasibility through a custom penalty function. ED3R also introduces a forward-looking capability, enabled through distributed neural regression models that allow the agents to anticipate the future by evaluating candidate strategies before execution. The framework is evaluated through realistic robotics simulations, ablation studies, and baseline comparisons. Overall, ED3R achieves a mission success rate of up to 97.18%. Especially in the most demanding missions, it reduces energy consumption by up to 36.4% and detects wildfires up to 41% faster than baselines.
2606.17739.paper_summary_zh: 機器人技術預期能夠支持環境監測和自然災害管理，在這些情況下，必須在不確定性、資源限制和嚴格的操作約束下做出決策。<lb/>在關鍵任務中，例如野火，機器人代理不僅必須以足夠的信心識別危險事件，還必須管理檢測的能量成本和時間。<lb/>本文介紹了ED3R，一個在不確定性下進行野火檢測的能量感知分散框架。<lb/>ED3R使機器人與遠程控制器之間能夠進行層級合作決策。<lb/>遠程控制器決定機器人的運動，而機器人則感知環境並決定在何處執行野火檢測（在機器人上或遠程）以及如何執行。<lb/>共同目標是以所需的信心檢測野火，同時最小化任何機器人操作所消耗的能量。<lb/>ED3R進一步整合了避免附近障礙物、預防冗餘探索、啟用自適應早期任務完成以及通過自定義懲罰函數確保可行性的機制。<lb/>ED3R還引入了一種前瞻性能力，通過分散的神經回歸模型使代理能夠在執行之前評估候選策略以預測未來。<lb/>該框架通過現實的機器人模擬、消融研究和基準比較進行評估。<lb/>總體而言，ED3R達到了高達97.18%的任務成功率。<lb/>特別是在最具挑戰性的任務中，它將能量消耗降低了高達36.4%，並且檢測野火的速度比基準快了高達41%。
2606.17739.author: Lina Magoula et.al.
2606.17739.authors: Lina Magoula, Nikolaos Koursioumpas, Nancy Alonistioti, Ramin Khalili
